meaning: n.赌场上的总管理人,副主持人
examples: The croupier wished him luck and spun the wheel.
Everybody is quiet when the croupier throws the ball.
NO01, the croupier can give you chips, or you can go to the cashier.
This masterful performance is then interrupted by a croupier offering him his winnings.
As well as Doherty, Monday's matches also feature 1995 runner-up Nigel Bond taking on part-time croupier Martin Gould and Judd Trump facing Tom Ford.
